title: Review: nie-wallet payment stack (4 commits)
notes:
Maintainer risk: MEDIUM — The Db/Connect error conflation and the params=None footgun are both patterns that will be copied by contributors. The diversifier pre-increment issue requires careful reading of next_diversifier to understand why it's correct; the comment misdirects.
Confidence: 85% chance of no missed critical bug. Uncertainty driven by: (1) cannot run build_shielded_tx with real Sapling params to verify builder.build() actually accepts the computed fee in the 1-output (no-change) case; (2) dispatch_payment state machine has many branches — cannot rule out a race between MLS key rotation and payment message delivery causing a session to be lost without being resync'd; (3) the FeeRule::standard() fee validation inside builder.build() is opaque — if it uses a different counting method than sapling_logical_actions the transaction could be rejected at broadcast time. Would raise confidence if: (1) integration test with real params covering the no-change path; (2) property test on dispatch_payment covering all (role, state, action) combinations; (3) reading zcash_primitives FeeRule::standard source to verify fee counting matches.
